creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text: Commit Ready is a bit deceiving. I assume once a maintainer approves a patch we move it to this status. But stop, it's not ready for commit. It needs further testing by the committer. I don't think I'm being pedantic here as there may be patches in PR that truly are *ready for commit* and just need someone to pull the trigger on it, or perhaps it's ready/tested and just waiting on further work to be committed.
